FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Desert Oasis Found
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Scouts have discovered a hidden water source near your settlement; a natural spring bubbling up through the rock, surrounded by unexpected greenery. In this parched landscape, water is power. How will you use this discovery?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Build irrigation channels to the settlement. We need food, not scenery.
Establish a waystation there for travelers and traders.
Keep it a secret. A private water source is a comfort in hard times.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Irrigated Farmland
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Engineers construct channels and aqueducts from the oasis to the settlement. For the first time, crops grow reliably in the desert soil. The settlement's food production is permanently improved.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Desert Waystation
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: A waystation built around the oasis becomes an essential stop for caravans crossing the desert. Traders pay handsomely for water and shelter, and the traffic brings new faces looking to settle.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Hidden Spring
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The oasis remains your settlement's secret. Knowing there's a reliable water source nearby, even in the worst droughts, gives settlers a quiet confidence. Morale is permanently bolstered by the security of hidden reserves.
